name: niblet
description: The diligent crumb-keeper for AI coding sessions. Niblet auto-writes findings to the project KB after every turn and surfaces workflow-pattern proposals at session end for your review. Sanitized capture — no secrets stored in logs. Per-session isolated. POSIX shell — macOS/Linux native; Windows via WSL2 or Git Bash.

interface.shortDescription: Session knowledge keeper for Kimi Code CLI
interface.longDescription: Niblet quietly captures discoveries, workflow patterns, and user feedback across AI coding sessions. It auto-writes KB entries and memory feedback, then proposes skills, agents, commands, scripts, and AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md updates for human review.

skillInstructions: You have the Niblet knowledge-keeper skill loaded. After every file-mutating tool call, invoke the niblet_log MCP tool. Route all KB, memory, skill, agent, command, script, AGENTS.md, and CLAUDE.md writes through niblet_apply. Use niblet_status for dashboards and niblet_promote to apply reviewed proposals.
